Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Iron Hive]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 6''' — The narrator's plasma cannons were warped after a battle at the Iron Hive.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 17''' — The Iron Hive is a shifting environment that can be destabilized by large weapons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 18''' — The Iron Hive is a location that can be mapped via hologram.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 18''' — The narrator fought through the Iron Hive.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 19''' — The Iron Hive was made from the metal of crashed starships.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 19''' — The Iron Hive was destroyed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 21''' — The narrator invaded the Iron Hive and destroyed the Iron King.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 36''' — An Iron Hive is a type of entity or organization that one might become a Shepherd for.}}

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 38''' — The narrator can direct enough Aether to destroy an Iron Hive.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 9''' — An Iron Hive is a type of structure associated with the Iron Legion.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 39''' — An Iron Hive can float near an inhabited planet.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
